title: How to Deadlifts for Maximum Gains

hook.name: Hook
hook.script: You're doing deadlifts wrong. Here's proof.
hook.delivery_notes: High energy, confident, slightly lean in toward camera

introduction.name: Introduction
introduction.script: My clients have used this to get real results. Here's exactly what we're covering: the setup, the execution, and the results.

rising_action.name: Setup
rising_action.purpose: Build tension and deliver core content - Part 1
rising_action.script: First, let's get your starting position right. For deadlifts, you want to...

climax.name: Climax - The Big Reveal
climax.purpose: Deliver the 'aha moment' - the key insight
climax.script: And THIS is the moment it all clicks. When you apply this to your deadlifts, you'll feel the difference immediately. This is what separates the people who get results from everyone else.
climax.visual_notes: Peak energy, dramatic pause before reveal
climax.delivery_notes: Slow down slightly for emphasis, then build to the reveal

resolution.name: Resolution & CTA
resolution.purpose: Recap key points and call to action
resolution.script: So remember: [quick 3-point summary]. That's what's going to get you results. Save this. You'll need it.

b_roll_shots: Common mistake demonstration (what NOT to do)
